_comment: SUBSTRATE SWAP 2026-05-30: the original DEV_full_Experiment_06_05_2026_1747 (55 items) was PRUNED from Langfuse (data retention — only 2 GT-ETI runs survive vs 40 on 2026-05-07). Re-pointed at the most recent surviving full run for the 55->71 item strengthening pass. RQ3 measures evaluator stability on a fixed (Q,A,context,fasitsvar) substrate, so the env/date the answers were generated does not affect the within-eval-stack noise we characterize (same rationale as the original DEV choice). The new run matches the current 71-item GT-ETI dataset exactly (no deleted-item 404s). The earlier 10-item DEV result is superseded as a pilot.
_substrate_vetting_2026-05-30: VETTED via rq3/_vet_substrate.py: QA_full_Experiment_28_05_2026_1446 (71 items) is 0/71 USABLE — the QA RAG was erroring on every item (answer={'error':'An error occurred',...}, 0 context chunks). QA_full_Experiment_18_05_2026_1831 (84 items) is 83/84 USABLE (answers ~1000-1300 chars, ~180 context chunks each). Chosen the 84-item run.
_dataset_run_name_prev: DEV_full_Experiment_06_05_2026_1747 (55 items) — NOT deleted: the GT-ETI dataset was reorganized 2026-05, old runs relocated to the 'GT-ETI-old' dataset (44 runs) and new per-municipality datasets created. The original substrate is still available in GT-ETI-old if strict pilot-continuity is wanted; the 84-item QA run (current GT-ETI) was chosen for the strengthening pass and the 40-item result replicates the pilot on this fresh substrate (cross-substrate robustness).
_dataset_run_rejected: QA_full_Experiment_28_05_2026_1446 (71 items, all RAG-error answers — unusable)

phase1._comment: Phase 1 reuses an existing run rather than triggering a new Container Job. The chosen run is the most recent full GT-ETI run as of 2026-05-07.
phase1.source: existing run (no new Container Job triggered)
candidates_considered: QA_full_Kommunefilter_06_05_2026_1024 (env=qa, 2026-05-06, has municipality flag null in metadata)
phase1.selection_rationale: Most recent full run with valid answers. Dev env is fine for RQ3 substrate because we are testing eval stability, not RAG quality — what matters is having real (question, answer, retrieved_context, fasitsvar) bundles, which this run provides. The dev RAG outage observed on 2026-05-07 (prompt_injection_node 500) does not affect this run because answers were generated 2026-05-06 when dev was healthy.

phase2._comment: repetitions_per_variant reduced from 10 to 5 on 2026-05-07 (D-010). item_limit set to 50 on 2026-05-30 (strengthening pass): the QA_full_18_05 run predates the current 71-item GT-ETI dataset, so 13/84 run-items reference DELETED dataset-items (404 on fetch, skipped). The first 50 run-items contain exactly 40 RESOLVABLE items -> we evaluate ~40 good items (user chose 40 of 84). retry_with_backoff patched to not retry deterministic 404s so deleted items skip instantly.

variants.name: baseline
variants.description: Pure repeatability. Default config (Anthropic Haiku 4.5, default RAGAS+DeepEval prompts).

variants.name: model_swap
variants.description: Same metrics, evaluator switched from Anthropic Haiku 4.5 to OpenAI GPT-5.1.

variants.name: prompt_rewrite
variants.description: Adds custom_faithfulness (single-step direct-judgment) alongside RAGAS faithfulness (two-step).

variants.name: claim_coverage
variants.description: Adds expert_A's claim-decomposition metric: fasitsvar broken into atomic claims, % covered by answer.
